description: Create an Epi Info 7 project named 'HouseholdSurvey' that structures a one-to-many relationship between households and family members. The parent form 'Household' must contain fields for 'Address' (Text), 'CensusTract' (Number), and 'VisitDate' (Date). Establish a link to a child form named 'Member' using a button labeled 'Add Family Member'. The 'Member' form should include fields for 'FullName' (Text), 'Age' (Number), and 'Sex' (Legal Values: 'Male', 'Female').
